prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 anime-style music illustration of a young woman in a neon cyberpunk night scene. The subject is a stylish anime girl with long dark purple-black hair with pink and blue rim highlights, shown from the waist up in a dynamic three-quarter pose, her hair blown dramatically across the frame. She wears large glossy over-ear DJ headphones with glowing cyan and magenta rings, a black choker, a delicate necklace, a loose white camisole, and an oversized dark jacket slipping off one shoulder. Her right hand lightly touches the headphones near her ear. Place a perfectly centered opaque square censor block over the face, covering the eyes, nose, and mouth, colored muted mauve-purple. Surround her with an energetic audio-visual swirl: exactly 8 prominent glowing musical notes, including 3 hot-pink notes near the upper left and upper right, 2 cyan notes on the left side, 1 cyan-and-pink note on the right edge, and 2 pink notes near the lower foreground. Add luminous curved light trails wrapping around her body, sparkling particles, star-like bokeh, and digital equalizer bars along the lower edge. Use electric blue, violet, magenta, hot pink, and deep black, high-contrast glossy lighting, detailed anime rendering, dramatic rim light, vibrant concert atmosphere, sharp hair strands, reflective headphone surfaces, and a dense magical music aura. No readable text, no watermark, no extra characters.
